REPLACE PROCEDURE s_transform_pose.p_s_transform_pose_pose_pop_trx_sum_hist( IN input_date_gte date DEFAULT NULL::date, IN input_date_lt date DEFAULT NULL::date) LANGUAGE 'plpgsql' AS $BODY$ DECLARE var_sync_time TIMESTAMP := clock_timestamp(); var_gte DATE; var_lt DATE; use_filter BOOLEAN := FALSE; BEGIN var_lt := COALESCE(input_date_lt, date_trunc('day', now())); IF input_date_gte IS NOT NULL THEN var_gte := input_date_gte; ELSE SELECT date_trunc('day', start_time) - interval '1 day' INTO var_gte FROM cron.job_run_details WHERE jobid IN ( SELECT jobid FROM cron.job WHERE jobname = 'sc_p_s_transform_pose_summary') AND status = 'succeeded' ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 1; IF NOT FOUND THEN var_gte := var_lt - interval '1 day'; END IF; END IF; CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_pose_pop_trx_sum_hist AS WITH population_historical AS ( SELECT * FROM s_transform_pose.pose_population_hist WHERE date_id >= var_gte::timestamp AND date_id < var_lt::timestamp ), summary_transaction AS ( SELECT * FROM s_transform_pose.transaction_summary WHERE date_id >= var_gte::timestamp AND date_id < var_lt::timestamp ) SELECT ph.doc_id, ph.date_id,
